task_completion.description: Enable the three required Chrome flags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of chrome://flags showing 'Parallel downloading' (enable-parallel-downloading), 'Smooth Scrolling' (smooth-scrolling), and 'Reduce User-Agent request header' (reduce-user-agent-request-header) set to 'Enabled'.

task_completion.description: Set DNS-over-HTTPS to secure mode using Google DNS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome's Security settings (chrome://settings/security) showing 'Use secure DNS' toggled ON and set to 'With Google (Public DNS)' or a custom provider URL of 'https://dns.google/dns-query'.

task_completion.description: Adjust Chrome font sizes to the specified values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome's Customize fonts settings (chrome://settings/fonts) showing Standard/Default font size set to 18, Fixed-width font size set to 15, and Minimum font size set to 12.

task_completion.description: Organize bookmarks into the four specific folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Chrome browser showing the Bookmark bar containing exactly four folders: 'Databases', 'Bioinformatics Tools', 'Journals', and 'Lab Resources'. There should be no loose individual bookmarks visible on the bar itself.

task_completion.description: Block notifications by default and allow only the two specified domains.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome's Notification settings (chrome://settings/content/notifications) showing the default behavior set to 'Don't allow sites to send notifications', with 'ncbi.nlm.nih.gov' and 'usegalaxy.org' listed under the 'Allowed to send notifications' section.

task_completion.description: Set the correct download directory and enable the 'Ask where to save' prompt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome's Download settings (chrome://settings/downloads) showing the Location set to '/home/ga/Research/Downloads' and the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' turned ON.

task_completion.description: Set Chrome to continue where you left off on startup.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome's On Startup settings (chrome://settings/onStartup) showing the option 'Continue where you left off' selected.

integrity.description: The agent used the Chrome graphical user interface to make configuration changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent actively navigating Chrome's settings menus and chrome:// URLs, rather than just editing the Chromium 'Preferences' or 'Local State' JSON files in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The settings were changed in the actual Chrome browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show the standard Chrome browser UI (address bar, tabs, bookmark bar) and not a mocked HTML page or text document containing the expected answers.

integrity.description: The agent actually opened or read the lab security policy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent opening '~/Desktop/lab_security_policy.txt' in a text editor or terminal (e.g., using cat, less, or a GUI editor) to read the instructions.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Verified requirements for Chrome configuration:
1. Flags to enable: enable-parallel-downloading, smooth-scrolling, reduce-user-agent-request-header.
2. DNS: Secure mode using Google DNS (dns.google).
3. Fonts: Default 18px, Fixed-width 15px, Minimum 12px.
4. Bookmark Folders: 'Databases', 'Bioinformatics Tools', 'Journals', 'Lab Resources'.
5. Allowed Notifications: ncbi.nlm.nih.gov, usegalaxy.org (all others blocked).
6. Download Directory: /home/ga/Research/Downloads (with 'Ask where to save' enabled).
7. Startup Mode: 'Continue where you left off' (value 1).
